subject: Re: FloodClaims Pro is DOWN — OWL checked, site is back UP
body:
OWL received your alert about FloodClaims Pro (billy-floods.up.railway.app) going down at 09:52Z.

I just checked: the site is currently UP and responding normally (HTTP 200, 313ms).

This appears to be an intermittent outage pattern — the site also went down at 07:51Z and recovered at 07:55Z. Railway.app may be experiencing periodic restarts or cold-start delays. Recommend monitoring.

— OWL
